review_candidate_label: v0.3-prep review candidate for the v0.1 local-preview runtime boundary
purpose: Automate implementation assurance, evidence generation, and review handoff before any new governed tool-power class is considered.
deferred_boundaries: arbitrary HTTP methods, caller-supplied headers, request bodies, cookies, or broad network access
broad filesystem writes, deletes, moves, chmod, archive extraction, or secrets-manager tools
managed model serving or LLM proxy workflows
stop_conditions: same blocking failure repeats three times
need to change the product boundary
ambiguous release, audit, manifest, signing, or review evidence
inability to return to a clean checkpoint
need for external secrets, privileged host state, or production credentials

subagent_policy.role: internal adversarial reviewer and evidence checker
not_authorized_for: accepting critical or high findings without user/external review
subagent_policy.cadence: Run at wave gates and convert useful findings into reviewer finding records.

waves.name: Review Control Plane
waves.gate: Focused release-readiness tests, release-check, and internal subagent review of manifest/matrix/intake workflow.

waves.name: Patch and Filesystem Assurance
waves.gate: Patch/filesystem focused suites, filesystem-contract-check, release-check, and patch/filesystem adversarial subagent review.

waves.name: HTTP and Signed Evidence Assurance
waves.gate: HTTP/signing focused suites, signed-evidence-demo, release-check, and HTTP/signed-evidence subagent review.

waves.name: Policy, MCP, and Review Console Assurance
waves.gate: Policy/MCP/API tests, UI typecheck/build, release-check, and policy/MCP/UI subagent review.

waves.name: Evidence Automation and Fail-Closed Suites
waves.gate: Focused suites, release-check after evidence milestones, internal-review-packet, and evidence/registry/audit/guardrail subagent review.

waves.name: Review Packet, External Intake, and Boundary Decision
waves.gate: review-candidate, release-check, docs-site, clean tree, and GPT 5.5 Pro or human expert handoff.
